title: Galaxies: Parzi's Star Wars Mod
description: Explore the galaxy with Galaxies: Parzi's Star Wars Mod!
body: Summary Galaxies: Parzi's Star Wars Mod (PSWG) is an immersive recreation of the Star Wars galaxy within Minecraft! Featuring planets, weapons, vehicles, structures, NPCs, character customization, and more, PSWG is under active development and Alpha builds are released weekly. Content is currently limited to Creative mode while the mod is in Alpha. The main focus of the upcoming Beta phase will be to integrate the Alpha content into survival and balance it in preparation for a 1.0 release.
